S.FORM: Sergei Bazarevich sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1965, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 3, Sergei Bazarevich, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: s~…ïer…£ei Œ≤azare*i ¶~ ®ƒß s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, s~…ïer…£ei Œ≤azare*i ¶~ ®ƒß, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
